lines.gurmukhi: ਅਭੈ ਪਦੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਨਕ ਬੰਧਨ ਛੋਰਿ ॥੨॥੫॥੯॥
lines.translit: abhai pad daan simaran suaamee ko prabh naanak bandhan chhor |2|5|9|
lines.english: Bless me with the gifts of the state of fearlessness, and meditative remembrance, Lord and Master; O Nanak, God is the Breaker of bonds. ||2||5||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਤਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: jaitasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਸਿੰਧੁ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਕੋ ਨੇਂਹ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kripaa sindh karunaa prabh dhaarahu har prem bhagat ko nenh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O God, ocean of mercy, shower Your mercy on me, that I may yearn for loving devotional worship of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਤ੍ਰਿਕ ਚਿਤਵਤ ਬਰਸਤ ਮੇਂਹ ॥
lines.translit: chaatrik chitavat barasat menh |
lines.english: The rainbird longs for the rain to fall.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਉਪਾਵ ਨ ਜੀਵਤ ਮੀਨਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਜਲ ਮਰਨਾ ਤੇਂਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aan upaav na jeevat meenaa bin jal maranaa tenh |1|
lines.english: The fish cannot survive any other way - without water, it dies. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਸੂਖ ਚਕਵੀ ਨਹੀ ਚਾਹਤ ਅਨਦ ਪੂਰਨ ਪੇਖਿ ਦੇਂਹ ॥
lines.translit: anik sookh chakavee nahee chaahat anad pooran pekh denh |
lines.english: The chakvi duck does not desire many comforts, but it is filled with bliss upon seeing the dawn.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਅਨਾਥ ਨਾਥ ਹਰਿ ਸਰਣੀ ਅਪੁਨੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇਂਹ ॥
lines.translit: ham anaath naath har saranee apunee kripaa karenh |
lines.english: I am a helpless orphan - I seek Your Sanctuary, O My Lord and Master; please bless me with Your mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਕਮਲ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਆਰਾਧੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਆਨ ਨ ਕੇਂਹ ॥੨॥੬॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: charan kamal naanak aaraadhai tis bin aan na kenh |2|6|10|
lines.english: Nanak worships and adores the Lord's lotus feet; without Him, there is no other at all. ||2||6||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਬਸਿ ਰਹੇ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: man tan bas rahe mere praan |
lines.english: The Lord, my very breath of life, abides in my mind and body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਤਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: jaitasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਠਗਉਰੀ ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪਾਈ ਤਿਨ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਅਉ ਭਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: prem tthgauree jin kau paaee tin ras peeo bhaaree |
lines.english: Those, unto whom You give the intoxicating herb of Your Love, drink in the supreme sublime essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਭੇਟੇ ਪੂਰਨ ਪੁਰਖ ਸੁਜਾਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa saadhoo sang bhette pooran purakh sujaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Bless me with Your mercy, and unite me with the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, O perfect, all-knowing Lord God. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕਵਨ ਹਮੑਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: taa kee keemat kehan na jaaee kudarat kavan hamaaree |1|
lines.english: I cannot describe their value; what power do I have? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਦੁਆਰੇ ॥੨॥੭॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: prabh simar simar simar sukh paaeo naanak saran duaare |2|7|11|
lines.english: Meditating, meditating, meditating in remembrance on God, peace is obtained; Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of Your Door. ||2||7||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਇ ਲਏ ਲੜਿ ਦਾਸ ਜਨ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਉਧਰੇ ਉਧਰਨਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: laae le larr daas jan apune udhare udharanahaare |
lines.english: The Lord attaches His humble servants to the hem of His robe, and they swim across the world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਏ ਅਨਿਕ ਜਨਮ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਸਰਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: aae anik janam bhram saranee |
lines.english: After wandering through so many incarnations, I have come to Your Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਧਰੁ ਦੇਹ ਅੰਧ ਕੂਪ ਤੇ ਲਾਵਹੁ ਅਪੁਨੀ ਚਰਣੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: audhar deh andh koop te laavahu apunee charanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Save me - lift my body up out of the deep, dark pit of the world, and attach me to Your feet. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਤਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: jaitasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਨਾ ਨਾਹਿਨ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਕਰਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: giaan dhiaan kichh karam na jaanaa naahin niramal karanee |
lines.english: I do not know anything about spiritual wisdom, meditation or karma, and my way of life is not clean and pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਕੈ ਅੰਚਲਿ ਲਾਵਹੁ ਬਿਖਮ ਨਦੀ ਜਾਇ ਤਰਣੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saadhasangat kai anchal laavahu bikham nadee jaae taranee |1|
lines.english: Please attach me to the hem of the robe of the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; help me to cross over the terrible river. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਸੰਪਤਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਰਸ ਮੀਠੇ ਇਹ ਨਹੀ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਧਰਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: sukh sanpat maaeaa ras meetthe ih nahee man meh dharanee |
lines.english: Comforts, riches and the sweet pleasures of Maya - do not implant these within your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਪਾਵਤ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਰੰਗ ਆਭਰਣੀ ॥੨॥੮॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: har darasan tripat naanak daas paavat har naam rang aabharanee |2|8|12|
lines.english: Slave Nanak is satisfied and satiated by the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan; his only ornamentation is the love of the Lord's Name. ||2||8||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: har jan simarahu hiradai raam |
lines.english: O humble servants of the Lord, remember the Lord in meditation within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਤਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: jaitasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਅਪਦਾ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਪੂਰਨ ਦਾਸ ਕੇ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jan kau apadaa nikatt na aavai pooran daas ke kaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Misfortune does not even approach the Lord's humble servant; the works of His slave are perfectly fulfilled. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਬਿਘਨ ਬਿਨਸਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਗੋਵਿਦ ਧਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: kott bighan binaseh har sevaa nihachal govid dhaam |
lines.english: Millions of obstacles are removed, by serving the Lord, and one enters into the eternal dwelling of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਵੰਤ ਭਗਤ ਕਉ ਭਉ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਆਦਰੁ ਦੇਵਤ ਜਾਮ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhagavant bhagat kau bhau kichh naahee aadar devat jaam |1|
lines.english: The Lord's devotee is very fortunate; he has absolutely no fear. Even the Messenger of Death pays homage to him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਆਨ ਜੋ ਕਰਣੀ ਸੋਈ ਸੋਈ ਬਿਨਸਤ ਖਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: taj gopaal aan jo karanee soee soee binasat khaam |
lines.english: Forsaking the Lord of the world, he does other deeds, but these are temporary and transitory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਗਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖ ਸਮੂਹ ਬਿਸਰਾਮ ॥੨॥੯॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: charan kamal hiradai gahu naanak sukh samooh bisaraam |2|9|13|
lines.english: Grasp the Lord's lotus feet, and hold them in your heart, O Nanak; you shall obtain absolute peace and bliss. ||2||9||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਤਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੯ ॥
lines.translit: jaitasaree mahalaa 9 |
lines.english: Jaitsree, Ninth Mehl: One Universal Creator God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਕਰਮ ਕੀਓ ਲਾਲਚ ਲਗਿ ਤਿਹ ਤਿਹ ਆਪੁ ਬੰਧਾਇਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo karam keeo laalach lag tih tih aap bandhaaeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whatever I do, while engaged in greed, only serves to bind me down. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਲਿਓ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਉਰਝਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: bhoolio man maaeaa urajhaaeo |
lines.english: My mind is deluded, entangled in Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਮਝ ਨ ਪਰੀ ਬਿਖੈ ਰਸ ਰਚਿਓ ਜਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੋ ਬਿਸਰਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: samajh na paree bikhai ras rachio jas har ko bisaraaeo |
lines.english: I have no understanding at all; I am engrossed in the pleasures of corruption, and I have forgotten the Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸੋ ਜਾਨਿਓ ਨਾਹਿਨ ਬਨੁ ਖੋਜਨ ਕਉ ਧਾਇਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sang suaamee so jaanio naahin ban khojan kau dhaaeo |1|
lines.english: The Lord and Master is with me, but I do not know Him. Instead, I run into the forest, looking for Him. ||1||
